Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Pawns]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Pawns are an army that can be used to drown targets in flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Pawns are part of the standard crew complement for an Iron Legion Penetrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Pawns are unholy abominations of metal and flesh that resemble four-limbed spiders made from corpses and leftover machinery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Pawns can be used to capture individuals and turn them into Shepherds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Pawns swarm around the barrier of the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Pawns are members of the Iron Legion that can be cooked in metal shells by Sola's gun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Pawns evaporate when they get near Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — Pawns are entities within the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — If the mission fails, the crew members will be made into Pawns.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Pawns are units associated with the Iron Legion.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
